name: creative
description: Set your own gamemode to Creative.
permissionErrorMessage: &cYou do not have permission to use /creative.

commands: execute as {player} at @s run gamemode creative @s

name: survival
description: Set your own gamemode to Survival.
permissionErrorMessage: &cYou do not have permission to use /survival.

commands: execute as {player} at @s run gamemode survival @s
